Risk Title: PR Approval Delays Impacting Cycle Time
Risk Description: Because of repeated PR approval delays and multiple retesting cycles observed in JIRA and confirmed by elevated cycle time and defect leakage in Metrics, there is a risk that sprint closures will be delayed, which could lead to missed delivery timelines and potential SLA breaches.
Potential Impact: Delivery delays, increased QA cost, SLA breach

SLA Metric: Cycle Time: 5-6 days | Integration: Dependency delays
Risk Description: Because of environment and external dependency delays highlighted in both JIRA and Metrics reports, there is a risk that integration and validation tasks will not complete on schedule, which could lead to extended cycle time and blocked production releases.
